DRRules.GeneralRules1: Doomsday Rampage is a 5-reel, 1-row video slot featuring a multiplier wheel with multipliers up to x100.

GeneralRules2.value: The game is played with 10 base bet for 1 line, bet level of %{minBetMtp} to %{maxBetMtp} and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.

DRRules.GeneralRules3: At every spin, any combinations of 3 or more matching symbols appearing anywhere on the reels will result in a winning combination.
DRRules.GeneralRules4: Winning combinations and payouts are made according to the “Paytable”.
DRRules.GeneralRules5: A combination win in cash is equal to the value shown in the “Paytable” multiplied by bet size and bet level.

DRPowerClamp.Title: Symbols with Power Clamp
DRPowerClamp.PowerClampExplanation1: Some symbols on the reels may appear with a Power Clamp attached to the top of the symbol.
DRPowerClamp.PowerClampExplanation2: During any winning spin, 3 or more symbols with Power Clamps will activate the Multiplier Wheel.

DRGreenMultiplierWheel.Title: Green Multiplier Wheel
DRGreenMultiplierWheel.GreenWheelExplanation1: During any winning spin, 3 symbols with Power Clamps will activate the Green Multiplier Wheel.
DRGreenMultiplierWheel.GreenWheelExplanation2: The activated Green Multiplier Wheel will spin and land on either x2, x3, x5, x10 or Level Up.
DRGreenMultiplierWheel.GreenWheelExplanation3: If the Green Multiplier Wheel lands on Level Up, the Purple Multiplier Wheel will be activated.
DRGreenMultiplierWheel.GreenWheelExplanation4: If the Green Multiplier Wheel lands on any multiplier value, the wins on the reels will be multiplied by the value before wins are paid.

DRPurpleMultiplierWheel.Title: Purple Multiplier Wheel
DRPurpleMultiplierWheel.PurpleWheelExplanation1: During any winning spin, 4 symbols with Power Clamps will activate the Purple Multiplier Wheel.
DRPurpleMultiplierWheel.PurpleWheelExplanation2: The Purple Multiplier Wheel can also be activated by landing on Level Up in Green Multiplier Wheel.
DRPurpleMultiplierWheel.PurpleWheelExplanation3: The activated Purple Multiplier Wheel will spin and land on either x10, x15, x20, x30 or Level Up.
DRPurpleMultiplierWheel.PurpleWheelExplanation4: If the Purple Multiplier Wheel lands on Level Up, the Red Multiplier Wheel will be activated.
DRPurpleMultiplierWheel.PurpleWheelExplanation5: If the Purple Multiplier Wheel lands on any multiplier value, the wins on the reels will be multiplied by the value before wins are paid.

DRGRedMultiplierWheel.Title: Red Multiplier Wheel
DRGRedMultiplierWheel.RedWheelExplanation1: During any winning spin, 5 symbols with Power Clamps will activate the Red Multiplier Wheel.
DRGRedMultiplierWheel.RedWheelExplanation2: The Red Multiplier Wheel can also be activated by landing on Level Up in Purple Multiplier Wheel.
DRGRedMultiplierWheel.RedWheelExplanation3: The activated Red Multiplier Wheel will spin and land on either x30, x50, x80 or x100.
DRGRedMultiplierWheel.RedWheelExplanation4: When the Red Multiplier Wheel lands on any multiplier value, the wins on the reels will be multiplied by the value before wins are paid.

DRMaximumWin.Title: Maximum Win
DRMaximumWin.MaximumWinExplanation1: The maximum win amount is %{5000}x of the bet amount.
DRMaximumWin.MaximumWinExplanation2: If the total win in the main game reaches %{5000}x of the bet amount, the spin ends.
